## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. e.g. "Adds 4 Certipy ESC1-ESC4 commands under credential-attacks/adcs/" -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes locally
- [ ] New command files live under `commands/<category>/<subcategory>/<id>.json` and the filename matches the `id`
- [ ] Each new command has a description, at least one realistic example, and a reference link where applicable
- [ ] Variations are used for auth-method variants instead of duplicating commands
- [ ] I tested the command(s) in a lab against a target I control
- [ ] If I added a new category or subcategory, I updated `commands/_categories.json`

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: tool versions, edge cases, why a command is structured a certain way. -->
